# Sudeep Arya

> Senior ecommerce and digital commerce leadership across Amazon 1P and 3P, marketplaces, Shopify+ and DTC, retail media, analytics, commerce technology, AI-assisted operations, and operating-model transformation.

Canonical site: [sudeeparya.com](https://sudeeparya.com/)

## Original publications

- [Publications hub](https://sudeeparya.com/publications/) - Original publications and decision systems on AI economics and content operations.
- [Running Before Crawling](https://sudeeparya.com/publications/running-before-crawling/) - Canonical HTML edition of the AI-economics publication, supported by the AI Cost Reality Calculator and AI Economics Decision Framework case study.
- [Small Team, Bigger Output](https://sudeeparya.com/publications/small-team-bigger-output/) - Canonical HTML edition of the content-operations publication, supported by the Content Workflow Snapshot and its case study.

## Supporting case studies and tools

- [Case-studies hub](https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/) - Ecommerce, marketplace, platform, analytics, and operating-model case-study library.
- [AI Economics Decision Framework case study](https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/ai-economics-decision-framework/) - Research and product-design case study for transparent AI economics; not a separate publication or client-results claim.
- [Small Team, Bigger Output case study](https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/small-team-bigger-output/) - Research governance, interaction design, deterministic modeling, privacy, and static implementation; no client result is claimed.
- [Banfield subscription commerce case study](https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/banfield-subscription-commerce/) - Public-safe subscription commerce and payment workflow case study.
- [Tools hub](https://sudeeparya.com/tools/) - Private browser-based commerce and AI decision tools.
- [AI Cost Reality Calculator](https://sudeeparya.com/tools/ai-cost-reality-calculator/) - Compares current and AI-assisted cost per successful outcome; user-entered values stay in the browser.
- [Content Workflow Snapshot](https://sudeeparya.com/tools/content-operations-readiness/) - Models approved-output economics; inputs and results are not transmitted or stored.

## Career and contact

- [Executive profile](https://sudeeparya.com/) - Career profile and executive summary.
- [Resume](https://sudeeparya.com/resume/) - Crawlable HTML career history, business outcomes, and leadership scope.
- [Skills](https://sudeeparya.com/skills/) - Commerce capability map across channels, platforms, analytics, media, and operations.
- [Recruiter brief](https://sudeeparya.com/recruiters/) - Role fit, leadership scope, location, and travel context for recruiters and hiring managers.
- [Digital Acceleration Audit](https://sudeeparya.com/audit/) - Audit overview and booking path.
- [Speaking and media engagements](https://sudeeparya.com/engagements/) - Podcast, panel, webinar, interview, roundtable, workshop, and media inquiries.
- [Contact](https://sudeeparya.com/contact/) - Contact form and scheduling paths.

Private confirmation pages, form-success pages, calculator inputs and results, and unpublished materials are excluded from this summary.
